occurrence_sentence: Created in 2017 by Pascale Senellart (CNRS senior scientist), Valérian Giesz and Niccolo Somaschi, Quandela is a spin-off from the Centre for Nanoscience and Nanoechnology (C2N, CNRS-Université Paris Saclay) in Palaiseau, in the scientific cluster of Paris-Saclay.

Created in 2017 by Pascale Senellart (CNRS senior scientist), Valérian Giesz and Niccolo Somaschi, Quandela is a spin-off from the Centre for Nanoscience and Nanoechnology (C2N, CNRS-Université Paris Saclay) in Palaiseau, in the scientific cluster of Paris-Saclay.
